title: Best Times to Visit Tiruvannamalai
subtitle: Planning your trip according to the seasons and lunar calendar
meta_description: The ideal season to visit Tiruvannamalai is October to March, with cool dry weather (20–30°C) perfect for Girivalam and temple visits.
body_html:
October to March

Ideal Season

Weather: Cool, dry, and pleasant (20–30°C)

Why Visit Now:

  • Comfortable for Girivalam and temple visits
  • Most ashrams and retreat centers hold programs and events
  • Great time for meditation and hill walks

Recommended for:

  • First-time visitors
  • International travelers
  • Long-stay spiritual retreats

April to June

Hot and Intense

Weather: Very hot (35–42°C)

Why Visit:

  • Fewer crowds—ideal if you seek deep solitude
  • Morning or evening Girivalam still possible

Tips:

  • Stay hydrated
  • Avoid midday outdoor activity
  • Choose accommodation with good ventilation or A/C

July to September

Monsoon Season

Weather: Occasional rain, cooler evenings

Why Visit:

  • Green landscape around Arunachala
  • Lesser footfall—quieter temple experience

Considerations:

  • Some outdoor caves or Girivalam paths may be slippery
  • Beautiful for photography and introspection
notes: Hero image and H1 appeared 3x in source; first instance kept. Season sections use h4 for the #### headings in source. No body images beyond hero.
